DPR: Create a data product that compares and contrasts the career trajectories of actors across the provided tables, analyzing trends in role types, frequency of appearances, and contributions to different media formats over time.
sub_questions: How does the frequency of appearances by Role vary over time in T1, T1397, and T289?

subquery_results.sub_question: How does the frequency of appearances by Role vary over time in T1, T1397, and T289?

attempts.sql:
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T1
GROUP BY Year, Role
UNION ALL
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T1397
GROUP BY Year, Role
UNION ALL
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T289
GROUP BY Year, Role;

subquery_results.final_sql:
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T1
GROUP BY Year, Role
UNION ALL
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T1397
GROUP BY Year, Role
UNION ALL
SELECT Year, Role, COUNT(*) AS Frequency
FROM T289
GROUP BY Year, Role;
subquery_results.mini_summary: The result set shows that the frequency of appearances for the role "Himself" varies over time, with 2 appearances in 1988, 1 appearance in 1994, and 1 appearance in 1996. Other roles, such as "George Newman" and "Police Station Thug," each have a frequency of 1 in 1989 and 1991, respectively.

Which Members appear in multiple Electoral_districts across T4, T18, T30, T104, T114, T116, T120, and T3962?

subquery_results.sub_question: What are the counts of Members by Party and Electoral_district in T4, T18, T30, T104, T114, T116, T120, and T3962?

attempts.sql:
SELECT Electoral_district, Party, COUNT(Member) AS Member_count
FROM (
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T4
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T18
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T30
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T114
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T116
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T120
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T3962
)
GROUP BY Electoral_district, Party;

subquery_results.final_sql:
SELECT Electoral_district, Party, COUNT(Member) AS Member_count
FROM (
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T4
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T18
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T30
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T114
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T116
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T120
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Electoral_district, Party, Member FROM T3962
)
GROUP BY Electoral_district, Party;

The result set does not show complete information for T4, T18, T30, T104, T114, T116, T120, and T3962.

subquery_results.sub_question: What is the total and average Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_ by Party in T215?

attempts.sql:
SELECT Party, 
       SUM(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Total_Expenses, 
       AVG(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Average_Expenses
FROM T215
GROUP BY Party;

SELECT Party, 
       SUM(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Total_Expenses, 
       AVG(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Average_Expenses
FROM T215
WHERE Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_ IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Party;

SELECT Party, 
       SUM(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Total_Expenses, 
       AVG(Expenses_July_2006_June_2009_) AS Average_Expenses
FROM T215
GROUP BY Party;

subquery_results.sub_question: Which Members appear in multiple Electoral_districts across T4, T18, T30, T104, T114, T116, T120, and T3962?

attempts.sql:
WITH Combined AS (
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T4
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T18
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T30
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T114
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T116
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T120
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Member, Electoral_district FROM T3962
)
SELECT Member
FROM Combined
GROUP BY Member
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Electoral_district) > 1;

WITH Combined AS (

WHERE Time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Nationality;
